doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: ABA Model Rule 5.5 concerns multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision, and contains no section on "Activities by Non-Lawyers" as presented here.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegals or non-lawyers, and contains no subsection (b) about "Activities by Non-Lawyers" with these specific provisions.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: ABA Model Rule 5.5 concerns multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision, and contains no section on "Activities by Non-Lawyers" as presented here.
